description: CompositionPure leather tote bag in brown with same colour zippers and yellow and white stitch detailingBag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a mild leather cleanerThis big tote bag is the ultimate piece of style. With ample space for all that you want to carry, including a spare set of clothes, you are all set to go on that special date or on an evening out with friends. Available in attractive colours like blood red, teal blue, moody grey, in-fashion yellow, sober beige, black and turquoise blue, the white and yellow stitch detailing adds a glam look to this uber stylish tote bag.
